label: agent loop • delegate a read-only Mac query via mac_query
query: What is the current output volume level on this Mac (0–100)? Use mac_query to read it from the system — do not guess and do not write AppleScript yourself in your reply.
notes: Production delegation path: the chat model must call mac_query once and report the subagent result. Scores 12B delegation discipline, not AppleScript-16B script authorship. Skips when no AppleScript model is installed (tool withheld). Off-CI.
